Championship Series Final

GAME
RECAP

Carolina closed its Championship Series run with a 24-16 win over California, jumping out to a 7-4 first-quarter lead and taking a 15-7 advantage into halftime before finishing the job.

16
CALIFORNIA REDWOODS
MAR 8, SUN
FINAL
24
CAROLINA CHAOS
Washington, D.C.
3:00 PM ET | ESPN+
